subcodes.first_line: O Manifestation of Guidance! By the name of Hidáyatí, and bearing the title of one possessed of wisdom and the healing art, mayest thou, God willing, combine both these attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظهر هدایت بنام هدایتی و بعنون صاحب حکمت و طبابت انشاء الله جامع هردو صفت
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @being a source of light; guidance, @excellence; distinction, @wisdom [hikmat], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
